name: sentiment-one-word

cases.input: I absolutely loved it, best purchase this year!

good_prompt:
Classify the sentiment of this review as exactly one lowercase word — positive, negative, or neutral. Output only that word, nothing else.

Review: {input}
bad_prompt: Tell me your thoughts about this review: {input}

name: extract-year

cases.input: The treaty was signed in 1994 after long talks.
She graduated in the summer of 2008.

good_prompt:
Extract the 4-digit year from the text. Output only the year, nothing else.

Text: {input}
bad_prompt: What can you tell me about the timeline here? {input}
